title: leucanthemum halleri
intro: Leucanthemum halleri, also known as the Alpine Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, particularly for treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Leucanthemum halleri include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
